# Quality Similar Sections

## Morning Watering

Water the raised beds early in the morning before the sun is high so that
moisture soaks into the soil instead of evaporating off the surface right
away during the hottest part of the day.

## Evening Watering

Water the raised beds early in the morning before the sun is high so that
moisture soaks into the soil instead of evaporating off the surface right
away during the hottest part of the night.
